task_completion.description: Create the three required layers with correct colors: Border (White), TitleBlock (Cyan), and Text (Green).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Layer List widget in the LibreCAD interface. It should display the layers 'Border', 'TitleBlock', and 'Text' with their corresponding color icons (White/Black depending on theme, Cyan, and Green).

task_completion.description: Draw the outer paper border and inner margin rectangles on the Border layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main drawing canvas. There should be two large concentric rectangles (the outer A3 paper size and the inner margin). They should be drawn using the Border layer's color.

task_completion.description: Draw the main title block rectangle in the bottom-right corner on the TitleBlock layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom-right corner of the inner margin rectangle. There should be a cyan rectangular box representing the outer boundary of the title block.

task_completion.description: Draw the horizontal and vertical divider lines inside the title block on the TitleBlock layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the cyan title block box, look for a horizontal line splitting the box into top and bottom rows, and a vertical line splitting the bottom row into left and right cells. These should also be cyan.

task_completion.description: Add the required text annotations to the title block on the Text layer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for green text inside the title block cells: 'RESIDENTIAL FLOOR PLAN' centered in the top row, 'Drawn: A. Torres' in the bottom-left cell, and 'Scale: 1:50' in the bottom-right cell.

task_completion.description: Save the drawing as a3_template.dxf in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Check the LibreCAD window title bar, tab name, or a 'Save As' dialog box. It should display the filename 'a3_template.dxf'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the LibreCAD graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the LibreCAD application open with active use of its drawing tools, layer management, and command line/dialogs, rather than just terminal windows.

integrity.description: The agent must not use a Python script or terminal commands to bypass the GUI and generate the DXF file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no screenshots of the agent writing Python code (e.g., using the 'ezdxf' library) in a text editor or terminal to create the file.

integrity.description: The drawing should be created progressively from a blank canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots should show the canvas starting empty and geometries/layers being added step-by-step, rather than a completed template suddenly appearing.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an A3 landscape template (420x297mm). The outer border is from (0,0) to (420,297). The inner margin is 10mm on all sides, from (10,10) to (410,287). The title block is positioned in the bottom-right corner from (240,10) to (410,50). Layers must be Border (White), TitleBlock (Cyan), and Text (Green). Text must include 'RESIDENTIAL FLOOR PLAN', 'Drawn: A. Torres', and 'Scale: 1:50' at approximately 5mm height. The final file must be named 'a3_template.dxf'.
